Usage: /n5 <question or command>

Examples:
- /n5 How to use UniversalDao paging
- /n5 Investigate batch processing error handling
- /n5 Transaction management handler configuration
- /n5 code-analysis                            # Run code analysis workflow
- /n5 keyword-search "UniversalDao paging"     # Keyword search (term-based, precise)
- /n5 semantic-search "How to implement paging" # Semantic search (natural language, exploratory)

Read .claude/skills/nabledge-5/SKILL.md and process the following according to its instructions.
$ARGUMENTS
